phrases.intent_en: When does the Prague bus leave?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus schedules are typically posted, but staff often know the next departure time.

likely_response.local: V deset třicet od hlavního vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At ten thirty from the main entrance.

responses.english: At ten thirty from the main entrance.
responses.local: V deset třicet od hlavního vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Is there a taxi stand outside?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis are typically lined up directly outside the terminal building.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, right in front of the departure hall.

responses.english: Yes, right in front of the departure hall.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the car rental desk?
phrases.cultural_note: Car rental desks are usually clustered in the arrivals area of smaller terminals.

likely_response.translation_en: In the arrivals hall, opposite the exit.

responses.english: In the arrivals hall, opposite the exit.

phrases.cultural_note: Small airports often have check-in directly visible from the entrance.

likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead, on the left in the hall.

responses.english: Straight ahead, on the left in the hall.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for luggage storage?
phrases.cultural_note: Smaller airports may have a simple self-service or attended luggage room.

likely_response.local: Platí se kartou nebo hotově na místě.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay by card or cash on the spot.

responses.english: You can pay by card or cash on the spot.
responses.local: Platí se kartou nebo hotově na místě.
